name: ReferenceEntity
summary: An entity that represents the data inserted from an external file.

methods.name: entities
methods.summary: The #entities method returns the Group that represents the Layout::ReferenceEntity in its exploded form.
methods.remarks: The #entities method returns the Group that represents the Layout::ReferenceEntity in its exploded form.

properties.name: clip_mask
properties.summary: The #clip_mask method returns the clip mask of the Layout::ReferenceEntity, or nil if it does not have a clip mask.
properties.remarks: The #clip_mask method returns the clip mask of the Layout::ReferenceEntity, or nil if it does not have a clip mask.
